market_pulse: Peak weekend competition: David Guetta & Marshmello headline major competitors; LIV Beach & Encore Book top-tier talent, Zouk trending with Meduza—market at full saturation with established DJ rotation.

weekend_readiness.label: HIGH
factors: All major competitors fully booked with A-tier talent
David Guetta at LIV Beach (Saturday) = tier-1 draw
LIV Nightclub lacks comparable weekend headline announcement
Zouk trending momentum with Meduza Saturday
weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Announce or secure last-minute talent for Saturday night. Risk: being outshined on peak revenue night. Consider flash promotion or VIP experience angle if new talent unavailable.

content_gaps.description: David Guetta, Marshmello, Meduza are anchoring competitors' weekend. LIV Beach & Nightclub lack comparable tier-1 artist announcement for this Friday/Saturday.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Announce Friday/Saturday headliner immediately or pivot to experience/promo strategy (VIP package, early-bird flash, themed night)

content_gaps.description: Competitors posting 3-5x weekly reels of DJ sets, crowd energy, behind-the-scenes. LIV social presence lighter on user-generated content.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Increase Stories & Reels to 5x weekly. Encourage user tags #LIVNightclub, feature attendee content, post mid-week energy clips (Wed-Thu).

content_gaps.description: Encore, Zouk, OMNIA all running countdown Stories to weekend events. LIV inventory less visible.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Start daily countdown Stories now through Sunday. Segment by venue (Nightclub vs. Beach), build anticipation with artist snippets.

influencer_activity.mention: Multiple user posts tag John Summit appearance at LIV events; strong organic sentiment and engagement with female audience (spring break vibes). April activity still generating engagement.
David Guetta confirmed Saturday at LIV Beach—major draw with 28M followers, cross-promotion to Fontainebleau partnership.
Friday & Saturday slots at Encore Beach Club; strong EDM audience segment, cross-promoted via Wynn channels.
Confirmed Saturday at Zouk; trending topic on Zouk's main IG feed (@zoukgrouplv) with 247K followers amplification.

liv_outreach_targets.reason: Sunday headliner at LIV Beach—already booked. Opportunity for pre-event Story takeover or live-mix promotion.

story_activity.summary: 5/29-5/31 countdown Stories running; featured Marshmello & Subtronics taglines; daily water/pool imagery with DJ overlays.
Meduza Saturday announcement posted across Stories and main feed; high engagement (247K followers). 'THE PIT' series featuring RL Grime (6.6), BOLO (6.5).
Tiësto Friday 5.29 featured in Stories; TAO Group cross-promotion active across OMNIA, Hakkasan, other properties.
Weekday (Monday) features @djstretchlv; growing dayclub audience (233K followers). Positioned as luxury daytime alternative.

venues.summary: EDC Week momentum fading; no major weekend headline announcement detected. General promotion ongoing but underperforming vs. competitors.

raw_posts.content_summary: EDC Week celebration at LIV Las Vegas; user-generated content featuring attendees and venue energy. Posted ~2 weeks ago.
General event calendar page updated with upcoming DJ lineups and event details for 2026 season.
John Summit appearance mentions in user videos; spring break crowd, female audience engagement high.

venues.summary: Weekend lineup strong: Linska (Fri), David Guetta (Sat), Sidepiece (Sun). Promoting premium dayclub experience; engagement high on Instagram.
